title: Lehoo Castle Toddler Cutlery, 6pcs Stainless Steel Unicorn Toddler Fork and Spoon Set, Children's Kids Cutlery Flatware, Incudes 3 x Spoons, 3 x Forks (No Knives)
features: [INCLUDES] 6 pcs toddler cutlery set, including 3 x forks, 3 x spoons (no knives). Prepare this cute cutlery for your little ready to welcome the New Year.
[SAFETY TODDLER CUTLERY] Made of durable food grade 304 stainless steel, it’ s all non-corrosive&BPA free&easy to clean (recommend wash by hand).
[EXCLUSIVE DESIGN FOR TODDLER] Ergonomically designed for toddler to grip in their small hands easily. Rounded fork and spoon without sharp edges, is safe for your kid’s eating.
[ENCOURAGE SELF-FEEDING] It’s time for teach your kid to feed themselves! Using this kid-friendly cutlery to help them eating independently with ease. Recommended for ages from 2-4 years.

[2 YEARS GUARANTEE] Customer’ s satisfaction is our top priority. Lehoo Castle provide 2 years guarantee and 24 hours response from our customer service team. Just order with absolute confidence today!
